passports.name: Patch Backup Hygiene Gate
passports.purpose_ru: Read-only pre-commit gate: проверяет, что H patch backups, handoff и smoke zones не tracked как source.
passports.purpose_en: Read-only pre-commit gate that verifies H patch backups, handoff and smoke zones are not tracked as source.
passports.validation_recipe: python -m py_compile; run against H repo; expect PASS_PATCH_BACKUP_HYGIENE after git rm --cached cleanup.
